case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS CASTILLO MELISSA

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,466.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO MELISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO MELISSA $4,466.00 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,480.79, NO INTEREST TO ACCRUE UNLESS DEFT DEFAULTS PAYMENT IN WHICH CASE INTEREST SHALL BE 10% PER YEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
